system.description:
Time: The adventurer must spend the entire region undertaking this activity.

Find the hidden paths through deadfalls or wetlands, or get bonuses to overcome terrain hazards.

Choose a type of trailblazing activity to undertake, then make a Nature, Investigation, or Perception check to attempt one of the following:

  • Find hidden paths: The adventurer searches for open paths through terrain blockages. On a success, the group ignores overland travel penalties for non-magical difficult terrain in the current region. Note that this does not provide any relief from difficult terrain during turn-based action.

  • Avoid terrain hazards: A successful check grants all characters an expertise die on all checks to avoid penalties or damage from the current terrain during overland travel. Difficult terrain is not covered by this option, and note that it does not provide any relief from penalties or damage from the terrain during turn-based action.

journeyProperties.criticalFailure: Instead of discovering anything helpful, the adventurer gets lost and gains 1 level of fatigue.
journeyProperties.failure: The adventurer finds no helpful routes.
journeyProperties.success: The adventurer gains the benefit matching their choice above.
journeyProperties.criticalSuccess: As success, but the adventurer also finds a Boon or Discovery.
